Enterprise Expansion

Budget Position
AllocatedCHF 5.2M
SpentCHF 3.4M
RemainingCHF 1.8M
Primary FrictionThe sales cycle exceeds the target range by 21 days.
Largest Open AssumptionThe partner network can scale without proportional increases in onboarding costs.
Most Critical RiskAggressive response from an established competitor in the enterprise segment.
